zh.Shelton,Norfolk,England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可雪登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Burgullion於1261年出生在英國素福爾可時，她的父親Robert de Burgullion11歲，母親Sarah6歲。她於大約1281年與Sir John De Shelton, III在英國英格蘭諾福爾可雪登結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1333年在英國諾福爾可雪登享年72歲。

zh-hans.Shelton,Norfolk,England: 英国英格兰諾福爾可雪登
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Burgullion于1261年出生在英国素福爾可时，她的父亲Robert de Burgullion11岁，母亲Sarah6岁。她于大约1281年与Sir John De Shelton, III在英国英格兰諾福爾可雪登结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1333年在英国諾福爾可雪登享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Burgullion was born in 1261, in Suffolk, England, her father, Robert de Burgullion, was 11 and her mother, Sarah, was 6. She married Sir John De Shelton, III about 1281, in Shelton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1333, in Shelton, Norfolk, England, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Burgullion est née en 1261, à Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Burgullion, avait 11 ans et sa mère, Sarah, avait 6 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John De Shelton, III environ 1281, à Shelton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1333, à Shelton, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Burgullion 1261 in Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Burgullion 11 und ihre Mutter Sarah 6. Sie hat um 1281 in Shelton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Sir John De Shelton, III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1333 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Shelton, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Burgullion è nata il nel 1261 nel Suffolk, England, sua padre, Robert de Burgullion, aveva 11 anni e sua madre, Sarah, aveva 6 anni. Lei sposato Sir John De Shelton, III circa 1281, nel Shelton, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1333, nel Shelton, Norfolk, England, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.Suffolk, England: イギリスイギリススフォルク
ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Burgullionが1261年にイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父Robert de Burgullionは11歳，母Sarahは6歳であった。約1281年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクシェルトンでSir John De Shelton, IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1333年にイギリスノーフォルクシェルトンで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Burgullion(이)가 1261년 영국 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Burgullion(은)는 11세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah(은)는 6세였다. 그녀는 대략 1281년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 셸턴에서 Sir John De Shelton, III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1333년 영국 노르폴크 셸턴에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Shelton,Norfolk,England: Shelton, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Burgullion nasceu em 1261, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Burgullion, tinha 11 anos e sua mãe, Sarah, tinha 6 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John De Shelton, III aproximadamente 1281, em Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1333, em Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Burgullion родилась в 1261 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Burgullion было 11 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah, 6. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John De Shelton, III около 1281 г. в местности шелтон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1333 г. в местности шелтон, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Burgullion nació en 1261, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Burgullion, tenía 11 años y su mamá, Sarah, tenía 6 años. Se casó con Sir John De Shelton, III aproximadamente 1281, en Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1333, en Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 72 años.
